description_long: This spice rack consists of two rectangular wooden bases, each holding three cylindrical glass jars with cork stoppers. The jars are filled with various colored substances, suggesting different spices or powders, and are arranged in a single row on each base. The glass jars are transparent, allowing the contents to be clearly visible, and each jar has a label, though the text is not fully legible. The cork stoppers are a natural brown color and fit snugly into the tops of the jars. The bases are a medium brown wood, providing a stable and visually warm foundation for the jars. The overall design is compact and practical, suitable for placement on a kitchen countertop or shelf in an urban home or café.
description: A pair of wooden spice racks each holding three glass jars with cork stoppers and colorful contents, arranged in a neat row. The jars are labeled and the rack is compact, ideal for countertop use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six jars with visible colored contents and labels, arranged in two rows of three on wooden bases.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical shape of the jars and the alignment of the cork stoppers, with one row of jars visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the jars and bases, with the colored contents less prominent and labels mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other row of jars, with cork stoppers and jar shapes clearly visible.
